# MOON Naturally Yours

MOON Naturally Yours is an Indian wellness e-commerce brand selling premium single-origin products sourced from Kashmir and the Himalayas. Products include Kashmiri Saffron (Mongra A++ grade), Himalayan Shilajit (gold grade), Kashmiri Honey (raw, wild mountain), Irani Saffron (Negin grade), Kashmiri Almonds, Kashmiri Walnuts, and Kashmiri Bilona Ghee. Ships across India. Website: https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com

## Products

### Himalayan Shilajit — Gold Grade (₹1,999)
A mineral-rich resin exudate collected from Himalayan rocks at elevations above 16,000 feet. Rich in fulvic acid and over 84 trace minerals. Third-party lab tested for purity and heavy metals. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for stamina, vitality, mental clarity, and recovery. MOON Shilajit is purified for potency and free from additives. Suitable for daily use — typically 300–500mg dissolved in warm water or milk.

### Kashmiri Saffron — Mongra A++ Grade (₹1,250)
Sourced exclusively from Pampore, Kashmir's primary saffron-growing region and the only GI-tagged saffron-producing area in India. Mongra is the highest quality classification of Kashmiri saffron, defined by deep red stigmas with no yellow style (stigma base) attached. Hand-sorted at harvest by local farmers and sun-dried without artificial heating. Tested for colour strength (crocin), flavour (picrocrocin), and aroma (safranal). Used in traditional kesar doodh (saffron milk), Mughlai cuisine, and wellness preparations.

### Kashmiri Honey — Wild Mountain Raw (₹1,150)
Unfiltered raw honey harvested from high-altitude Kashmir meadows between 2,000–3,500 metres elevation. Wild-sourced from Himalayan flora including alpine wildflowers. Free from heating, filtration, or additives — all of which destroy natural enzymes and antioxidants. Enzyme-rich and naturally crystallising in cold months (crystallisation indicates raw, unprocessed honey). Harvested seasonally and stored in food-grade glass jars.

### Irani Saffron — Negin Grade (₹1,050)
Negin grade Iranian saffron consisting of whole, long saffron threads selected for balanced flavour and strong colour release. Sourced from Iran, the world's largest saffron producer. Suits everyday culinary use, teas, desserts, and rice preparations. Offers a slightly milder aroma profile than Kashmiri Mongra, making it well-suited for daily cooking.

### Kashmiri Almonds — Premium Whole Kernels (₹899)
Naturally grown almonds from Kashmir valley orchards. Unroasted and unsalted, cleaned and graded for uniform size and crisp texture. Rich in vitamin E, magnesium, and healthy monounsaturated fats. Suitable for direct snacking, soaking overnight, or use in traditional badam milk (almond milk) preparations.

### Kashmiri Walnuts — Orchard Select (₹950)
Fresh-crop walnuts sourced from Kashmir orchards, available as half and whole kernels. Harvested seasonally and selected for clean, unbroken kernel quality. Naturally high in omega-3 fatty acids (ALA), antioxidants, and polyphenols. Recommended for daily consumption for cardiovascular and cognitive health support.

### Kashmiri Ghee — Bilona Process (₹1,350)
Small-batch clarified butter prepared using the traditional bilona (hand-churned) method. Made from cultured cream churned in earthen pots, then slow-simmered for a deep, nutty aromatic finish. The bilona process preserves A2 fat structure and naturally occurring butyric acid. Ideal for Ayurvedic cooking, tempering spices, and traditional wellness routines (e.g., morning ghee on warm bread or in herbal preparations).

## Shipping & Ordering
- Ships across India
- Estimated delivery: 2–7 days depending on zone (North 2–3 days, South 3–4 days, East 4–5 days, Northeast 5–7 days)
- Razorpay payment gateway — UPI, cards, net banking accepted
- Contact: hello@moonnaturallyyours.com
- Website: https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com

## About the Brand
MOON Naturally Yours was founded on the principle of making traditionally sourced South Asian wellness products accessible online with the transparency and quality assurance that modern consumers expect. Every product is single-origin, traceable to a specific region, and selected for purity over volume.
